evidence.label: 沪深创趋势一致性

breadth.label: 市场宽度
breadth.summary: 市场宽度偏弱，情绪强于赚钱效应。

evidence.label: 上涨家数占比

evidence.label: 行业上涨占比
evidence.note: 行业扩散越充分，行情越健康。

evidence.label: 涨跌停结构
evidence.note: 涨停多且跌停少代表情绪仍可用。

evidence.label: 最高连板
evidence.note: 连板高度衡量短线风险偏好。

evidence.label: 指数与宽度一致性
evidence.note: 指数强但宽度弱时降分。

liquidity.label: 成交与流动性
liquidity.summary: 成交活跃度尚可，资金更多集中在中小盘。

evidence.label: 指数平均量能比
evidence.note: 温和放量优于缩量或爆量。

evidence.label: 中小盘成交占比

evidence.label: 大盘成交占比
evidence.note: 大盘承接不足会降低趋势稳定性。

capital_flow.label: 资金与风险偏好
capital_flow.summary: 北向流入但主力流出，资金层面是分歧上行。

evidence.label: 北向净流入
evidence.note: 外资流入对风险偏好有支撑。

evidence.label: 主力净流入
evidence.note: 主力大幅流出代表内资分歧。

evidence.label: 中小盘成交占比
evidence.note: 风险偏好越高，进攻仓可用性越强。

evidence.label: 内外资一致性
evidence.note: 北向和主力同向时更可靠，背离时降分。

evidence.label: 行业资金承接
evidence.note: 主线方向有资金承接时加分。

mainline.label: 主线强度
mainline.summary: 科技成长主线明确，但资金集中度偏高。

evidence.label: 涨幅前五行业均值
evidence.note: 领涨行业涨幅越强，主线越清晰。

evidence.label: 前五行业净流入合计
evidence.note: 资金集中流入说明主线有承接。

evidence.label: 价量重合主线数
evidence.note: 涨幅榜和资金榜重合越高越可靠。

evidence.label: 资金主线组数
evidence.note: 主线过窄时降低扩仓质量。

evidence.label: 连续性数据
evidence.note: 没有多日主线验证，按中性偏低处理。

valuation.label: 估值与再定价
valuation.summary: 估值数据缺失，按中性处理并降低置信度。

evidence.label: 估值分位
evidence.note: 缺估值时不主观乐观，先给中性分。

macro.label: 宏观与外部环境
macro.summary: 国内流动性友好，海外利率仍有压制。

evidence.label: 中国10Y国债
evidence.note: 国内利率低，对权益流动性有支撑。

evidence.label: 美国10Y国债
evidence.note: 海外利率高会压制成长资产估值。

evidence.label: 美元指数
evidence.note: 美元偏强时风险偏好承压。

evidence.label: 美元兑人民币
evidence.note: 人民币稳定有利于外资和风险偏好。

items.label: 指数强但上涨家数不足
北向流入但主力大幅流出
资金过度集中在单一主线

volatility_targeting.note: 以目标年化波动率缩放基准权益仓位，波动越高仓位越低。

factor_changes: capital_flow removed duplicate mid/small turnover and top industry inflow scoring
breadth added median and strong advancer/decliner placeholders when available
crowding penalties changed from hard thresholds to gradients
confidence now distinguishes core, important, and auxiliary missing fields
valuation now scores 5-year index PE/PB percentiles instead of a neutral placeholder
capital flow and mainline modules use rolling persistence features
volatility targeting reports a second-layer adjusted position range
key_constraints: 上涨家数和行业上涨占比不足时，不把指数强势直接等同于全面加仓。
主力资金持续流出时，进攻仓只做主线，不扩散到弱势行业。
估值分位偏贵时，即使趋势强也要用拥挤惩罚约束泡沫风险。
波动率目标缩放只调整执行仓位，不覆盖原始市场机会分，便于复盘归因。

factor_changes: stock account position policy v2 uses recommended_equity_position_range as the official position output
risk_caps are resolved by lowest score_cap with severity as tie-breaker, and records expose applied_cap plus discarded_caps for conflict review
risk_caps can cap final market_position_score for bubble, blowoff volume, sector concentration, high volatility, crowding, missing risk data, and strong-index weak-breadth regimes
8% target-volatility scaling is deprecated and no longer changes the official stock-account position range
position ranges now use stock-account exposure and can reach 90%-100% in low-crowding strong trends
capital_flow removed duplicate mid/small turnover and top industry inflow scoring
breadth added median and strong advancer/decliner placeholders when available
crowding penalties changed from hard thresholds to gradients
confidence now distinguishes core, important, and auxiliary missing fields
valuation now scores 5-year index PE/PB percentiles instead of a neutral placeholder
capital flow and mainline modules use rolling persistence features
allocation_policy_v1 replaces the old four-sleeve summary with five stock-account sleeves: core wide ETF, mainline ETF, leader alpha, defensive quality, and cash-like
market_regime_v1 adds a structural layer for accumulation, expansion, distribution, and contraction classification
market_trend_v1 adds trend_state, trend_strength, and trend_duration from index trend, breadth persistence, and liquidity slope
risk_engine_v1 adds continuous risk_penalty_score and risk_discount before hard risk_cap constraints

factor_changes: stock account position policy v2 uses recommended_equity_position_range as the official position output
risk_caps are resolved by lowest score_cap with severity as tie-breaker, and records expose applied_cap plus discarded_caps for conflict review
risk_caps can cap final market_position_score for bubble, blowoff volume, sector concentration, high volatility, crowding, missing risk data, and strong-index weak-breadth regimes
8% target-volatility scaling is deprecated and no longer changes the official stock-account position range
position ranges now use stock-account exposure and can reach 90%-100% in low-crowding strong trends
capital_flow removed duplicate mid/small turnover and top industry inflow scoring
breadth added median and strong advancer/decliner placeholders when available
crowding penalties changed from hard thresholds to gradients
confidence now distinguishes core, important, and auxiliary missing fields
valuation now scores 5-year index PE/PB percentiles instead of a neutral placeholder
capital flow and mainline modules use rolling persistence features
allocation_policy_v1 replaces the old four-sleeve summary with five stock-account sleeves: core wide ETF, mainline ETF, leader alpha, defensive quality, and cash-like
market_regime_v1 adds a structural layer for accumulation, expansion, distribution, and contraction classification
market_trend_v1 adds trend_state, trend_strength, and trend_duration from index trend, breadth persistence, and liquidity slope
risk_engine_v1 adds continuous risk_penalty_score and risk_discount before hard risk_cap constraints
position_model_v1 maps base position through trend, regime, and risk multipliers before hard risk_cap constraints

factor_changes: stock account position policy v2 uses recommended_equity_position_range as the official position output
risk_caps are resolved by lowest score_cap with severity as tie-breaker, and records expose applied_cap plus discarded_caps for conflict review
risk_caps can cap final market_position_score for bubble, blowoff volume, sector concentration, high volatility, crowding, missing risk data, and strong-index weak-breadth regimes
8% target-volatility scaling is deprecated and no longer changes the official stock-account position range
position ranges now use stock-account exposure and can reach 90%-100% in low-crowding strong trends
capital_flow removed duplicate mid/small turnover and top industry inflow scoring
breadth added median and strong advancer/decliner placeholders when available
crowding penalties changed from hard thresholds to gradients
confidence now distinguishes core, important, and auxiliary missing fields
valuation now scores 5-year index PE/PB percentiles instead of a neutral placeholder
capital flow and mainline modules use rolling persistence features
allocation_policy_v1 replaces the old four-sleeve summary with five stock-account sleeves: core wide ETF, mainline ETF, leader alpha, defensive quality, and cash-like
market_regime_v1 adds a structural layer for accumulation, expansion, distribution, and contraction classification
market_trend_v1 adds trend_state, trend_strength, and trend_duration from index trend, breadth persistence, and liquidity slope
risk_engine_v1 adds continuous risk_penalty_score and risk_discount before hard risk_cap constraints
position_model_v1 maps base position through trend, regime, and risk multipliers before hard risk_cap constraints
key_constraints: 上涨家数和行业上涨占比不足时，不把指数强势直接等同于全面加仓。
主力资金持续流出时，进攻仓只做主线，不扩散到弱势行业。
估值分位偏贵时，即使趋势强也要用拥挤惩罚和风险上限约束泡沫风险。
北向与主力资金同时大幅流出时，即使趋势分高也触发资金退潮仓位上限。
成交额或换手极端放量且估值/波动偏高时，按爆量顶部风险限制股票账户仓位。
前五行业资金或涨幅高度集中且估值/波动偏高时，按主线拥挤顶部风险限制股票账户仓位。
股票账户官方仓位不再按8%目标波动率缩放，波动率仅作为风险扣分、上限和提示。
